---
title: "Cyrus Martinian Lab Notebook: Summer 2026"
theme: darkly
---

# Daily Experiment Log

[6_22](/experiments/2026_6_22/plan_EnrichedT.qmd)

[6_23](/experiments/2026_6_23/result_ON_EnrichedT.qmd)

[6_29](/experiments/2026_6_29/result_30min_CAR_1.qmd)

[6_30](/experiments/2026_6_30/result_ON_CAR_1.qmd)

[7_1](/experiments/2026_07_01/result_ON_CAR_2.qmd)

[7_7](/experiments/2026_07_07/plan_ON_fixed_PBMC.qmd)

[7_8](/experiments/2026_07_08/result_ON_PBMC.qmd)
